TestCase.name: testCustomOpMapping
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM TO_CHANGELOG(input => TABLE t_updating PARTITION BY id, op => DESCRIPTOR(op_code), op_mapping => MAP['INSERT','I', 'DELETE','D', 'UPDATE_AFTER','U'])

LogicalProject(id=[$0], op_code=[$1], name=[$2], cnt=[$3]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'op_code'), MAP(_UTF-16LE'INSERT':VARCHAR(12) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", _UTF-16LE'I', _UTF-16LE'DELETE':VARCHAR(12) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", _UTF-16LE'D', _UTF-16LE'UPDATE_AFTER':VARCHAR(12) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", _UTF-16LE'U'), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) op_code, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, BIGINT cnt)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], cnt=[$2]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], cnt=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t]])

ProcessTableFunction(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'op_code'), MAP(_UTF-16LE'INSERT':VARCHAR(12) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", _UTF-16LE'I', _UTF-16LE'DELETE':VARCHAR(12) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", _UTF-16LE'D', _UTF-16LE'UPDATE_AFTER':VARCHAR(12) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", _UTF-16LE'U'), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], uid=[TO_CHANGELOG], select=[id,op_code,name,cnt], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) op_code, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, BIGINT cnt)]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id]]) +- GroupAggregate(groupBy=[id, name], select=[id, name, COUNT(*) AS cnt]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id, name]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t, project=[id, name], metadata=[]]], fields=[id, name])

TestCase.name: testCustomOpName
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM TO_CHANGELOG(input => TABLE t_updating PARTITION BY id, op => DESCRIPTOR(op_code))

LogicalProject(id=[$0], op_code=[$1], name=[$2], cnt=[$3]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'op_code'), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) op_code, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, BIGINT cnt)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], cnt=[$2]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], cnt=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t]])

ProcessTableFunction(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0), DESCRIPTOR(_UTF-16LE'op_code'), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], uid=[TO_CHANGELOG], select=[id,op_code,name,cnt], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) op_code, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, BIGINT cnt)]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id]]) +- GroupAggregate(groupBy=[id, name], select=[id, name, COUNT(*) AS cnt]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id, name]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t, project=[id, name], metadata=[]]], fields=[id, name])

TestCase.name: testDefaultCall
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM TO_CHANGELOG(input => TABLE t_updating PARTITION BY id)

LogicalProject(id=[$0], op=[$1], name=[$2], cnt=[$3]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) op, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, BIGINT cnt)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], cnt=[$2]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], cnt=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t]])

ProcessTableFunction(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], uid=[TO_CHANGELOG], select=[id,op,name,cnt], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) op, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, BIGINT cnt)]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id]]) +- GroupAggregate(groupBy=[id, name], select=[id, name, COUNT(*) AS cnt]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id, name]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t, project=[id, name], metadata=[]]], fields=[id, name])

TestCase.name: testMultiplePartitionKeys
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM TO_CHANGELOG(input => TABLE t_updating PARTITION BY (id, name))

LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], op=[$2], cnt=[$3]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0, $1), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, VARCHAR(2147483647) op, BIGINT cnt)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], cnt=[$2]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], cnt=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t]])

ProcessTableFunction(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0) PARTITION BY($0, $1), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], uid=[TO_CHANGELOG], select=[id,name,op,cnt], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name, VARCHAR(2147483647) op, BIGINT cnt)]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id, name]]) +- GroupAggregate(groupBy=[id, name], select=[id, name, COUNT(*) AS cnt]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id, name]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, t, project=[id, name], metadata=[]]], fields=[id, name])
